title: sideritis hirsuta var. hirta
intro: Sideritis hirsuta var. hirta, also known as mountain tea or Greek mountain tea, is a type of flowering plant native to the mountainous regions of the Mediterranean. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds, which have been traditionally used to treat a range of health issues. The health benefits of sideritis hirsuta var. hirta include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and supporting the immune system, among others. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
